reviews.review_text:
Update: The mandatory security bond they demand if you book online feels like a coordinated scam. My bank statements prove I paid $285 online for a room that cost $281, was forced to pay an additional $100 bond on arrival, and then paid another $144 to extend. No refund ever came back, not from the Aspen Holidays Holtze AU, neither from Darwin Free Spirit Resort & Holidays Park (btw why there are two accounts?). They have pocketed the extra money, refuse to acknowledge the math, and are outright lying in public to save face. If you stay here, keep every receipt and be ready to open a dispute with your bank, because they will lie to avoid responsibility.

The guest I reported didn’t just engage in indecent behavior; he masturbated in front of me. I explicitly warned management that this same predator was also watching CHILDREN at the pool. Their only solution to a major safety threat was to offer to move me to a different room while dismissing his behavior and leaving a predator completely free on the property.

Avoid this place.
Do not believe them when they say your security bond will be returned "immediately."  My $100 was never paid back. It has been a total loss.

​The facilities are failing—the air conditioning in the tiny studio couldn't keep up with 30°C heat, and the fridge stayed warm. There is also an issue with privacy and theft; staff or someone else clears out ashtrays in the middle of the night right outside your door—creepy and intrusive!
​
​Most alarmingly, there are serious safety concerns. A guest followed me around the property and engaged in indecent behavior. When I complained, management's excuses ranged from "he's mentally ill" to "we can't locate him," even though he was in the room right next to mine. Their dismissive attitude toward guest safety and basic hospitality is unacceptable.

​Save your money and stay somewhere safe and functional.
Excellent place to stay. Spotlessly clean and very quiet
Great pools, great food, and a great place to stay

10/10 would definitely stay here again! so happy my friend suggested this place to stay it has beautiful rooms, great scenery and the staff are so friendly and welcoming! more specifically Lily at reception. she was so helpful and really made checking in and out of this place easy! Thank you Lily and all the other stuff we will be back!
Great swing pool 🏊 and bar

My visit was a long time ago, but I figured it was still recent enough to be relevant. Maybe.

The sheer amount of problems I have with this place is insane. The rooms... 𝑜𝒽 𝓂𝓎 𝒢𝑜𝒹, the ROOMS were 𝒽𝑜𝓇𝓇𝒾𝒷𝓁𝑒. As soon as my family and I checked into our cabin, it was instantly unwelcoming. The interior looked like a Khrushchev-era Soviet apartment complex, except only the ones that look like bunkers, not the ones with cozy wallpaper and flooring.

But hey, at least those Khrushchevka apartments wouldn't have to deal with pests too often. I wish I could have said the same for our cabin. The people at the front desk had told us that the apartments were recently sprayed for pests, but the cabin we got was absolutely overrun by beetles and roaches! Big ones, too!

After a moment of consideration, I just decided to go for a walk with everyone except my mum, who wanted to stay back and try to deal with the infestation problem (the front desk refused to do anything about it). The jumping pillow looked fun, but the sand surrounding it had so many sand flies that, if an animal had died on it, the poor creature would have been entirely consumed by midnight.

So, since that was utterly off-limits, we returned to the cabin after about an hour. Upon arrival, we were all shocked to see a whole PILE of dead roaches on the floor. I'm not exaggerating when I say this was a noticeably big pile. Thank God they were dead. Apparently, Mum had been working overtime to kill as many as she could, and yet, she couldn't even get them all, as dinner time was spent scooping, chewing, and swiping at little bugs getting too close to our plates.

We had originally planned a 3-day stay, but we decided to pack up and leave before I even got to use the bed. Something tells me that was divine intervention.

Would not recommend it if I were held at gunpoint.
Held a function here recently and it exceeded expectations. The staff were lovely, easy to work with and so helpful. Would definitely hold a function here again.

Location was great 5min to gateway 15min to Darwin CBD. We stayed 7 nights in a 2 bedroom cabin. Surroundings were nice and tropical ( coming from the desert it was nice to see green) poolside bar and bistro was welcoming. We ended up having dinner there every night with nightly specials but also a good menu. All staff were very helpful and polite. We went in off peak so got a grate deal. Definitely money well spent. Will definitely stay there again.

Absolutely disgusting, garbage resort.
Air conditioning didn’t work
Moved to a substandard cabin which was filthy, bright lights all around and worn out thin curtains.
Disgusting response from receptionist, after hours manager has no business doing anything to do with customer service, but then again nor did the receptionist. The attitudes from staff and conditions at this dump are what the NT needs to move away from. The she’ll be right it’s the NT doesn’t really cut it. Evolve or get out of hospitality. No need for a response, you had your chance when I tried to speak to you in person, I will never ever be back at your facility and I hope people who read this will give you a miss.

Toxic Management that trickles all the way down to the Staff . Physical brawls between bar staff just some of the colourful behaviour that can be observed . The parent company needs to make big changes for this to be a well run organisation.

Awesome stay children enjoyed the activities

Awesome reception service by Emile and Kayla

I recently stayed at Free Spirit Resort after winning a family room through a raffle, and unfortunately the entire experience was far below enjoyable.

Despite organising the booking with the manager on 7th January 2026, I arrived on the day of check‑in to discover that my room had not been booked at all. Luckily for me, they were able to secure a cabin near bushland.

Then at check‑in, I was told I needed to pay a $100 deposit—something that had never been mentioned beforehand. I explained that I had not budgeted for this and that I was experiencing financial hardship. The receptionist assured me the deposit would be released immediately upon check‑out. It is now Wednesday (I checked out on Monday), and after following up, I was told my refund “bounced back” and no one bothered to follow up. Strangely, the same staff member was able to manually process the refund to the exact same card, making their excuse (or lie) feel even weaker. Regardless of my financial situation, the error should not have occurred and the issue should have been followed up appropriately.

During my stay, it became clear that staff engagement and care were lacking. A loud domestic dispute broke out between two families at the pool, and staff made no effort to intervene or even acknowledge the situation. The food was overpriced and honestly comparable to service‑station quality—if anything, servo food is better.
The most unsettling moment was being followed back to my cabin by a staff member in a ute, who proceeded to lecture me about my driving speed. Even after I acknowledged and apologised, he continued lecturing me, then sat outside my cabin in his vehicle for several minutes, staring in as if to intimidate me before finally driving off. It was completely inappropriate and made me feel unsafe.
Overall, I cannot recommend Free Spirit Resort. If you happen to win a voucher through a raffle, you’re better off giving it away—or throwing it straight in the bin. My experience was stressful, unprofessional, and absolutely not worth the trouble.
I love this place
Had an issue after hours called Justin fixed my issue with great friendly service. Good bloke.

Hi||||I would like to make a complaint about the onsite maintenance officer at Darwin free spirit resort that was working on the night of 10 January 2026||||Whilst I had my dog in the dog park at 9 pm which is 1 hour before quiet time at 10 pm. The maintenance officer on duty stopped at the end of the dog park and my dog commenced barking. At which point the maintenance officer on duty was yelling out to me - “get your dog  to shut the f$&k up.”  He yelled this at me a couple of times. I responded with - “ it’s before 10pm and I’m in the dog park”. He then proceeded to drive off.||||I don’t appreciate being a paying customer at the park that I should suffer this verbal abuse when I or my dog is doing nothing wrong. This is uncalled for and unwarranted. The angry maintenance officer has many outbursts at other customers that I have witnessed. Particularly at the children of my friends.||||Can I ask - do the maintenance staff at the park have a working with children check ? Some of the abuse the children receieve from the same guy is reprehensible.||||I can’t imagine this person is a good representative of your brand values that state - customer centric. - as one of the aspen core values

This resort was amazing! The room had everything I needed. The facility was clean and tidy, the pool and gardens were well maintained. The staff in the reception (Nat who helped check me in), the bar / bistro staff were great (Gina) & security / after hours support (Mark) were fantastic. (For example - My elderly friend was locked out of her room and she was helped promptly and offered a glass of water while she waited, which only took 5 mins.)  I will be back for sure. A very affordable holiday for families.

Met up with some interstate friend's at FreeSpirit few time's over last week
As a Darwin local I cannot believe I've never found this gem (locals are welcome ). Fantastic pool great family environment and super cold beer
The staff are amazing, could not give more praise to Gina and Jewlia

Recently had my mums 50th and my brothers 30th birthday at free spirit and hired out the event tent near the stage and it was awesome the staff were lovely it was easy to set up and organise and they cleaned up afterwards which was amazing so appreciative! Would 100% recommend for family and friends to stay and party with free spirit, prices are a little high but mostly worth the price, will for sure stay again 😁

The venue looked great the menu looked good too. But this is Darwin and a bland Nasi Gorang that's not even warm (heat or spice) with a cut up deep fried snitty on it. Fail. Three chicken wrap was nice three chips undercooked some cold some hot? This place could be a great spot for lunch or dinner but the food we got today was so poor we won't be coming back.
Was a great experience! And would like to thank felicity in reception for helping my family and I.

Stayed here 2 nights in a standard Cabin. Aircon was not well wasn’t cold room was okay but there were dirty dishes there was no tv remote. Very small cabin for 4 peoples and both pools were very hot. I will not be staying there again.

Came here a few years ago, and it was great. Second time here, and what a let down. Staff very disinterested, and not helpful. They seemed to have very little knowledge of the layout of the park, and the park is now very run down, full of "permanents" , and not to mention the amenities. Very Dirty. And to top it all off, the Caravan Park is infested with, and full of Mosquito's. You could not  venture out of your van without being attacked by them at all  hours of the day and night...Absolutely stressful, and annoying, and one week later still dealing with all the bites! The Park needs alot of maintenance and money spent on it to get it back to anywhere near what it used to be. Would not recommend staying here in my opinion, and to find another Caravan Park in Darwin....There are many!

Our studio queen room was clean and the bed was comfortable, the shower was a good size with good water pressure and  shower head. The climate control system kept the room at a pleasant temperature all night, but the walls could not keep the sounds of the partying neighbours out.
We enjoyed a dip in the nice pool and the meals we chose were very nice. Our room had a small fridge with a small milk there were a few coffee sachets, tea bags, sugar a toaster but no butter or jam mini sachets.
The city is quite a way of but for me we were close to where we needed to be.

Mit 57A$ eher teuer und bis auf den Barmann (echt nett und zuvorkommend) eher mau.
Wir hatten mit Power, Betonplatte, ausreichend Platz. Toiletten, Koch sag mal so- ich habe noch gedient und da war auf‘s Klo gehen schöner
Just a great place to get away to and is very quiet and safe

Loved our stay here a few weeks ago.  Hannah, Polly and Felicity in reception were amazing, so welcoming and helpful - thanks girls. Francesca in the bar was always happy, friendly and funny. Murray was always helpful and friendly helping us to find our way back to our cabin on a few occasions. Our cabin was beautiful, clean and in a great position. Loved this place and will be back again in the future.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I recently attended a 3-day conference at Darwin FreeSpirit Resort and was thoroughly impressed! The rooms were immaculate, the linen fresh, and the air-conditioning wonderfully effective — all the modern comforts needed for a relaxing stay.

The food and beverage options were outstanding, catering to a wide range of dietary requirements, and everything was plentiful and delicious. Great coffee too 🤍The function room was beautifully set up, nice and cool, and equipped with easy-to-use technology.

The staff truly made the experience exceptional... friendly, helpful, and always smiling. I honestly couldn’t fault a thing. Highly recommend this venue for conferences, events, or a relaxing getaway! 🤩

If you’re looking for a venue to host an event, Free Spirit is definitely worth considering. The staff are so helpful and willing to accommodate your every need. The timing was spot on and the food very tasty.

Have spent 5 nights here in a Cabin, access the pool , bar and restaurant daily. It's a fantastic place, and little wonder locals have functions here too .|Thanks in particular to office staff Felicity and Maddie, who help me out with obtaining some important documents I needed, any printing out some hard copies.|This is a seriously good holiday park !

Beautiful caravan park - we had a powered site and our parents had a cabin close by. The cabin was clean, spacious and most importantly had good air conditioning! We all enjoyed the pool and had a nice dinner at the open air restaurant one night. Staff were friendly and attentive which made our stay very enjoyable. We would definitely stay here again.
Awesome park. Stayed here 13 years ago and again for 8 nights in the premium caravan sites. Awesome park. Clean amenities. Highly recommend for families.
We had a great 5 night stay here. Great service, roomy sites, refreshing pool (3 to choose from) and the Seafood Special on Monday night at the bistro was great value for money.

Had a 5 night stay in one of the Garden Villa cabins which was perfect for our needs, the park was tidy and clean with friendly, amazing staff, food was superb at the Bistro along with the drinks by the pool.
Was good,Darwin not so much

What a fantastic park!
Amenities were very clean, gardens were immaculate and our powered site was huge!
Such a great location to explore Darwin and surrounds.
If we are ever back in Darwin we would definitely stay here again.

While staying in a cabin for 8 to 9 months of which we paid on time and pet cleaning fee and bond amount. First the fridge died and was replaced with a smaller older fridge. Months later we were moved to another cabin as maggots came out of the flooring of which we were accused by a very nosy and arrogant cleaner that it was from the dogs bowl which had rice in it and on the other side of the room. We then moved to another cabin and as we were only going to be there just over a week we decided not to bother trying to put everything away as there not enough space and we stored the boxes on the floor out of our way, well old maggot nose decided it was messy and call the supervisor and took photos of our belongings and the office has them on file. Also the shower head detached from the wall and towel rail loose from the wall from a previous guest . The toilet seat and cistern were both new as I also saw the damaged ones in the garbage bin a week before. We checked out because they told us that they are booked out for the motocross but that cabin was empty all weekend. We were down right lied to. After purchasing a caravan we booked a caravan site  to set up before we leave. First night $80 second night $99, more than double most other places. When we asked for our bond back we were told that it was absorbed and no bond will be returned. Just so happened that someone else was asking the same question and was told the same answer and since we left there we have met quite a few others that have the same issue there. One word for that is called steeling. Then they tried to take more payment from my account without any contact, I made sure that didn’t happen, I was suspicious it would happen.
Ps if you book a cabin there make sure it’s not one with all the dead tree rubbish on the roof, major fire hazard.

Awesome spot to stay. We stayed on a premium site which we loved the green grass and only sharing bathroom with a few. Loved the pool and bar area. Friendly and helpful staff… we would have loved to stay for longer if we had time.
Polly was great on check in and extending our stay and Francesca at the bar were both fabulous!
Lovely large park, excellent facilities and amenities, including lovely bistro overlooking the pool. Friendly staff, Felicity was very helpful and welcoming!
We stayed in our caravan. The place is so well maintained and clean. The amenities were so nice and staff were very helpful

The place is very clean and tidy with great facilities
The girls at reception are extremely happy and helpful i had the chance to chat with all of them on separate occasions (Hannah, Polly and Felicity)
The only thing was the seafood truck on the main road was annoying!!

Great facility’s, extremely clean!
Hanna, Polly & Felicity in reception are so friendly and informative! Fantastic with recommendations of tours and points of interest around the area.
Food and cocktails are great with entertainment by the pool. Would definitely stay here again! Highly recommended

Great air con, hot water, pools x3, food is great...
Happy dayyss.....

I just wanted to share my amazing wedding experience that I had at the free spirit ! I couldn’t fault a single thing ! From amazing service to the lovely coordinator jewels who made everything so stress free with her amazing attitude , service and communication . The food was great (all guests loved it ) the decorations were beautiful and met my expectations to a T! .The marquee tent outside was perfect size fitting 80 very comfortably, and the gardens made for beautiful wedding photos ! The rooms we booked were clean a cozy and not one complaint from other guests attending the wedding . I highly recommend this for a wedding venue hands down ! ..
Once our booking was sorted we were very happy with our Stay.|I would like to give a big shout out to Bert, who was a great communicator and an asset to the Company. - Jackie
Great park staff friendly and helpful .Bar staff friendly and great service will be back next year Best park in darwin.Food also very good

Standard cabin is really only suitable for one human being otherwise you have to move around the cabin like bots 🙄
Next time I'll go a family room for more comfort. 😌

We had my husband's 40th birthday party in the Elements Function room for over 40 people. It was an amazing evening with the best food platters and bar service. Jewel and the team made so much effort to make the night one to remember. It was a stress-free evening where everyone could enjoy themselves to the maximum. Everyone had a fabulous time. We would highly recommend you using this venue for your next big event.

Having stayed at x3 caravan parks in this area outside Darwin for periods of 3 nights, we have chosen Aspen Darwin because of the excellent service provided by the reception staff. Whilst a caravan park closer to Darwin city suits us because we drive into the city every day, we prefer to drive the extra 8klm x 2 daily, just because the reception staff, namely Polly and Hannah provide a great service. These bright girls will do well in their chosen careers.
Absolutely loved our stay and we are excited to return next year! Great park and a big shout out to Tegan, Hannah, Megan & Polly on reception always have a smile on their faces and happy to help!

Great place to stay with a bar and pool.
At times has good atmosphere.
Personly i wasn't too happy with the food but hey other people may love it.
Has cheap accommodation too
Both Polly and Hannah were a joy to deal with staff go above and beyond with every request I will definitely be returning due to these fantastic employees
Great location a work in progress.very friendly staff
Kids loved the pools.

Room was nice and clean but no internet access. They've clean my room but lost my pillow, someone also took my chair outside my room. Didn't left me soap and ants was everywhere. My spot was also a bit far from everything. Stayed there for 2 weeks.

We had our wedding at FreeSpirit Resort few weeks ago and it was truly a flawless experience from start to finish. Jewel went above and beyond to cater to all our needs and made sure everything ran smoothly throughout the day. Wether it was the endless emails, million questions or last minute changes nothing was ever a issue.

The venue set up was everything we could’ve ever imagined and knowing Jewel and the team were there meant we could fully relax.

One thing that really stood out was their attention to dietary requirements — they ensured there were plenty of delicious gluten-free and dairy-free options available, which our guests really appreciated and loved. Every detail was thoughtfully handled, and we felt completely supported the entire time.

The venue itself is beautiful, and the service was exceptional. We couldn't have asked for a better place to celebrate such a special moment. Highly recommend FreeSpirit Resort for anyone planning a wedding or event!

We must say that this was one of the best caravan parks we’ve stayed at. All the staff including reception and care takers were amazing. So helpful and polite. We all enjoyed our stay here including our 2 dogs, amazing dog area which they loved. The toilets and showers were always clean and nice hot water with good pressure. The pool areas were fantastic and the bistro area was so relaxing with live music to enjoy. We’d like to thank everyone here for a great experience. Warwick and myself give this park a 10 out of 10 🥰
Absolutely love this resort,  stayed on the huts, highly recommended
I went here with my dad and kids for a holiday and it was stunning definitely worth coming here
Clean facilities & lovely staff, definitely recommend if you need a spot near Darwin to stay for awhile x @tessamargrit

Comoda posizione vicino all'autostrada. Pochi bagni datati e non in ordine. Prezzo esagerato per quello che offre.
Buono il bar...

Excellent park. We had a powered caravan site. We paid a little extra for premium site which was larger with grass & slab. Very well kept grounds, very clean & roomy amenities. Good food at bar & bistro on site. One main pool with 2 smaller ones. Camp kitchen with everything you may need. Very secure with coded gates for entry & exit. Fuel out front, very close to shopping centre & easy access from highway. Highly recommend.

We recently celebrated our daughter 1st birthday at Darwin FreeSpirit Resort, and it honestly couldn’t have been a more perfect venue. From start to finish, the experience was seamless, convenient, and just what we needed for a special day with family and friends.

The air-conditioned function room was spacious, clean, and beautifully lit with natural light, which made it super comfortable for both kids and adults (especially in Darwin’s heat!). The location is ideal, easy for guests to get to, with plenty of parking and a relaxed, tropical vibe as soon as you enter the resort.

We had external vendors come in to set up soft play and decorations, and the team at FreeSpirit was so flexible and accommodating—nothing was too hard, and they really helped take the stress out of the day. Every staff member we spoke to was friendly, professional, and genuinely supportive. You can tell they care about their guests having a great experience.

The food was delicious and came out exactly on time—hot, fresh, and with generous portions. We had so many compliments from our guests!

Whether you’re hosting a birthday, baby shower, or any type of event, I can’t recommend Darwin FreeSpirit Resort enough. The atmosphere is chilled but polished, and it’s a place where you can truly enjoy the moment while the team takes care of the rest.

Thanks again to the FreeSpirit team for helping make our little girl’s first birthday one we’ll never forget 💕🌴

Love a place that has soap in the soap dispenser near the dump point.

Love the pool/bar dining area such a WIN.

Lice music happened so frequently here which is also awesome. Lage grassy sites were good. I requested to stay in the litchfield area and I would request that area again.

Good spot.
Was a very good size, clean and had everything you would have needed. Good pools at the park as well would stay again!

Jewels and the amazing staff at free sprit were just the best had our big special day there on the 13/07/2025 and could not fault them 1 bit Accommodated not only us but a lot of our interstate travellers, thank you so much to jewels and team
Really delicious food at the restaurant. Nice park too but the food was the highlight of the trip. Bravo 👏

management is absolutely terrible.
I booked a dog friendly site as the website states dog friendly, however once we arrived we were told they have a 1 dog policy and we have 2. Nowhere on their website is thism stated and their pet policy page simply doesn’t exist.
they were incredibly unhelpful when I told them we had travelled so far to stay there and everywhere else was now booked out but they simply said too bad.

We had to booked for the premium site. Toilets and showers are immaculate, the only down size is we have to share it with others. What a massive caravan park. I love the bouncing pillow for kids. If I’m not mistaken there were more than one swimming pool inside the park. Shared kitchen is cleaned every day. Amazing! Thumbs up!

More to this, the coolest thing is we got to see squadron practice in the morning or afternoon. You are able to see a few (I think)  F35 jets flying around. (I instantly have Top Gun imagination in my head)
Quiet, clean, all amenities, centrally located close to city, airport, art gallery, major transport links etc.

i had my 18th birthday party at free spirit resort, the venue was so lovely, it was enough room for everyone that i had invited, the food was amazing. but not only the jewel they’re events coordinator was fantastic, she communicated thoroughly with me for months, planning my birthday and making sure everything was set, she was flexible, understanding, and just overall amazing. would definitely recommended any event to be hosted here. free spirit resort and they’re even coordinator jewel are truly amazing!

Great place, except  wed, thur,Fri & Sat nites they have live music next to the pool. If you have a cabin around the pool.omg it's soo loud.a heads up would have been Nice. So I had the option to say no to the cabin. The music isnt bad its just way too loud.& when the live entertainments stops they blast music from tye bar.on 1 note it was playing loudly after midenite.i feel that guests dont have a right to quiet enjoyment in cabins around the pool.& these cabin are very expensiveT.v doesn't connect to the wi-fi, door handle on bedroom door was broken. Stained towles& sheets. Mould in the kettle.toaster filthy.i think for most people this would be a great place.petrol station next door, palmeston just a few miles down the rd.the pools looks very popular. My cabin had a space for parking but the fence prevents me from parking next to my cabin.i have to park outside the fence.there is also 1 girl at reception who just isn't very friendly.& other staff, like house keeping & gardeners & alike don't say hi when you say hi to them.

Great atmosphere and nice work on renovations. But looks like it's funded from lack of quality of food coming out of the kitchen.

Food was clearly frozen and microwaved. Lacked quality meat including the chicken and ribs. Not even remotely worth the $35+ price tag!
Nice pool and bar area. Was a good getaway

We stayed in an Studio room. Clean and well presented. Aircon and fan on, when I entered the room. It was a welcome relief from the warm weather outside. Shower very refreshing after spending a couple of weeks in the bush. All the usual things in a Studio room. Laundries in park all well equipped with washers and dryers. Camp kitchens were also very clean and well maintained. Lounge Areas were comfortable too. It's a great park.
Cheers and thanks to all the staff who made our stay very comfortable...
Great place

Very nice park. Had problems getting to use disability bathroom because we weren't in high paying section but eventually got access. Not all staff know what is going on in the park. Couldn't tell us why we're paying more for our site than others across the road.

I spent a lovely week in the palm cabin at the Darwin  freespirit with my partner while I was visiting from Tasmania, the rooms of the freespirit were very clean and well maintained the only thing I would've had to complain about was that the quality of the kitchen equipment it would be ideal to upgrade the equipment to metal instead of plastic. But part from that the kitchen was clean with heaps of room for cooking bathroom was clean and well stocked for two people.

Review is for management. I booked over the phone and when looking at the booking a month or so later, I realised that there was a mistake in the booking. I rang and ended up speaking to the manager (Hannah?) who tried to blame me for the booking error and then wanted to charge me $25 to amend it. I said I wasnt going to pay for a mistake I didnt make. She then changed it without charging me and hung up the phone. The park itself was fine, however I might not have stayed if I knew the main pool wouldn't be available.
Super für die Durchreise, abends ein Bier an der Bar

We just recently held our wedding at free spirit resort.
Excellent staff cannot promote Jewel enough for helping planning and supporting us from beggining of planning to staying late on the night.
Great guest rates for our family alongside our wedding booking,
Awesome air-conditioned marquee that held spaces for our kids area, bar and buffet.
Our cabin for the 2 nights was spacious with kitchenette.
We love coming to elements just for a good feed and was the perfect spot for our wedding.
Love the new look for the pool area ❤️
Very clean, friendly staff and great food stayed 9 days.

I had been looking for a venue to have my wedding reception at, and contacted the events manager, Jewel. She was absolutely amazing to deal with! I had no doubts about my event as I knew it was in good hands! The venue itself, couldn’t have asked for anything better! Having access to Elements, onsite accommodation, a nice big pool, and the restaurant and bar was so convenient! We really enjoyed our stay and event at FreeSpirit Resort and would happily go back again!

Great and friendly staff service the team go out of their way to cater to your needs.
The food is really good and it is great value as well. Nothing is really overpriced.:
The venue also has very good wheelchair access

Can’t recommend free spirit enough for hosting an event. We had our wedding here in March and it was perfect from the space to the food and our event co ordination Jewel was absolutely incredible. She honestly took the stress out of it all  the food was great and our guest loved it. Room was spacious with our our kitchette and bathroom
Have stayed here many times and had many corporate functions in the marquee. Perfect mix of outdoors with aircon inside, great food options and pool for the kids and play area.
Stayed here for 7 nights and had a 60th birthday party there by the pool which was amazing, bar food and staff were fantastic

Recently had our wedding here and it was absolutely perfect, thank you Jewels for going above and beyond and making sure we had our perfect day and night , and thank you too all the rest of the staff for putting up with us rowdy bunch lol (over 100 people) 😆 the function room setup was beautiful, well spaced and we honestly are so over the moon with this resort and there staff for everything they have done to help me in the last 10 months behind the scenes for the wedding.. highly recommended and the upgrades to the pool are beautiful 😍 🤩 👌

Massive shout out from our family to yours x

I was looking to do a surprise party for my wife. I went in to reception to see what the possibilities were to book a couple Reims together so we could have a little surprise party with some family and friends. After a chat with Jewel from the functions and events team we ended up having our own function room that was fully air conditioned came with a large TV and speaker so we could play music. Also multiple food options and drinks packages.food was delicious and they even supplied a bar tender. Definitely recommend for your next function

Thanks Jewel and all the team for helping to make such a memorable occasion.

A great family friendly resort.
Service is amazing food great and the kids love the pool.
They are also amazing with supporting sporting groups and and fundraising.
The marquees and function room are great size perfect for any occasion. Jewel is a pleasure to deal with.
Highly recommend

After our amazing wedding in July, 2024 - when we fell pregnant soon after I knew I was going to have my baby shower at Free Spirit. Being in the end of the wet season and super humid, it was a no brainer to utilise the function room! Once again, Jewel was amazing in helping me with set up and food. The food was absolutely amazing and everyone left with full bellies! The price for the service you receive is fair and honestly, the function room itself is great! There aren’t many places in Darwin that have this kind of function room for the price and inclusions you receive at Free Spirit (trust me I searched)!
The team made the process even more seamless than the wedding and I didn’t even have to lift a finger. I trusted that Jewel would once again work her magic which she of course did!
Hopefully a place we can continue to come back to in the future! Thank you for making our special events easy and smooth!
P.S the new floors are great!

A good run establishment. Excellent bistro, and comfortable accommodation. Value is very good. Parking and location are very convenient, although only a few km's outside Darwin are still in a great spot. Has a pool and secure entry property.
Such an amazing place to stay. Very clean, great cabins, awesome pools and friendly staff.
On arrival at Aspen was greeted by Felicity at reception, she was very welcoming and had a great knowledge of the surrounding areas. Great facilities. Would recommend Aspen.

We had car issues & towing a caravan we rolled up to Aspen FreeSpirit Park at Darwin which was the closest park to the dealership.
Felicity couldn't have been more helpful or caring.
We only had to stay 2 nights but their caring & helpful attitude saved alot of angst on our part.

A fantastic place to stay. Food and service is amazing. Staff are incredible, special mention to Chef Ron, Bartender Tanya and reception staff Leah, Hannah and Felicity. Unfortunately the room could have been a bit bigger for the wheelchair.
Thank you for having us.
Julie and Sean.

Lovely park. Paid for premium caravan site, great big tree stump smack bang in the middle of our bay! Had dinner first night at bar, food was terrible!! We t to go into play pool in the gaming room but it closed at 8pm!!
Lots of bats, possums. Lovely!
I'm pretty sure I saw a honey badger in the park last night.

so disappointed wanted to stay there  was told only 1 dog per site but then read on web site on mangers digression  both my dogs are small and always on leads unlike so many I have seen in our travels won't be recommending this 1 obviously

The customer service was fantastic. Hannah and Felicity, were very friendly, helpful.
Highly recommended.

I met Hannah at the service desk. She was polite, patient and very helpful booking my accommodation.
The room was clean and the bed was comfortable giving me 2 nights of good sleep.
I would highly recommend staying at Aspen Holidays Darwin Free Spirit.
Stayed in caravan park had a great time

I have just finished 20nights at this very good park  I was ver impressed with all amenities and camp kitchen and all the staff that I delt with were so professional especially the laddies in the office as well as bistro bar staff I will definitely be coming back in the future
Regards John White
Great caravan park many various site styles and great pools in the heat

Haven't stayed but called in for a drink , very friendly staff .
Unfortunately dropped my wallet,  called and it had been handed in . Thank you for you great service and honesty.  Wallet returned safely
It's a nice caravan/cabin park
Nice Place Home Away From Home With The Best Of Services

An awesome caravan park to stay at as it's very quiet and peaceful.
The amenities/facilities are clean and very handy for use for the guests. There's a bistro, a beer garden and a lovely pool as well. The caravan park also has event venues where one can hire for Weddings/birthday or just a gathering. Great location for shops (Mall) or school which is only a couple of minutes of drive to Palmerston shopping mall or schools etc etc. Highly recommended 👍

Good park with friendly staff. Biggest issue spoiling our stay was the out of control kids and careless parents. Pool unusable if you just want to relax as kids of all ages just divebomb on top of you and when pulled up or reported to staff just keep doing it. Parents (if around) even encouraging this misbehaviour and getting mouthy. Don’t think we will come back in a hurry.

Everything was fine, apart from the reception desk closing at 5. My flight didn’t get in until 6 so I had a little stress event when I arrived to find a closed office. Fortunately, the night security guard was able to help so all’s well that ends well.

Excellent value for money.  Ideal if you don't want to travel right into Darwin. Friendly & helpful staff.  Reception open times need to be advertised with the booking agents.  Booking Agent was terrible, lacking essential information.
Stayed in our caravan best stop so far on the loop really nice food excellent bar great syaff even live music on the week ends 3 pools good amenities no problems staying there again
We loved this place and stayed in our van for 2 weeks with our 3 kids. So much to do and the pool /restaurant area was fabulous.
Staff were amazing, great hospitality and well mannered Room was tidy and all facilities were usable.10/10 with the help of some beautiful staff.
Very good atmosphere. Enjoyed the live music. Staff are friendly. Could maybe have some bigger sites to accommodate bigger rigs more easily. But the stay was very enjoyable
Fantastic holiday park. Attention to detail to ensure your stay is enjoyable. Lovely tropical surrounds. Friendly staff. Great food and entertainment.

We had my daughter's 10th birthday party by the pool and it was perfect. Jewel was very helpful and quick to respond to my emails. All the staff were very helpful and friendly on the day and venue is great. We've even decided to have my son's upcoming birthday there too!
An excellent place to stay.
Had to change my review place has become a hot  spot for drunks to stay at very noisy at night in the motel rooms.

We hosted my daughter's birthday party by the pool at Free Spirit resort and it was perfect 👌.  The kids played for hours in the pool, and its not too deep so great for games their younger siblings in there too. Planning and booking was straightforward, the platters were feverishly devoured and having the bar, bistro and bathroom facilities on hand made it a breeze. Big shout out to the staff Jewel,  Mattie and Saloni, who made a great day easy, and were truly lovely with our whole spectrum of kids.  Much appreciated team. 👏
Im not expecting was great like that! Bed really good, big size room, quiet. Recommend

Rang FreeSpirit Resort from Melbourne to notify flight arrival after midnight. Asked for instructions for getting a key for the booking paid for online. Spoke to someone called 'Hannah' who told me I had not paid a $100 security. I told Hannah that I had paid the booking online. She insisted that the security fee had to be paid or lose the booking. She asked for my credit detials over the telephone only then would I be sent a code to unlock a box to get the key. I said I was unhappy about giving credit detials over the phone. When I arrived by taxi, the code unlocked the box but there was no key. A security person checked the box and got the manager. The managers' response to me 'where's the envelope?'. Taxi driver backed my story. The code had been given to another person and my booking. It was left to the security person to check this information and eventually given another cabin. There was no apology or offer of extended checkout. I did not feel safe and worried about my credit card detials. To make things worse, aircon dripped on my head. I chose to leave.

Rang yesterday and spoke with Laura, she was so helpful. I rang back today and asked to speak to her again so we could book our holiday there in July next year. Laura again provided exceptional customer service to us-thank you!
Bernie Cameron has gone above and beyond to provide service that is always smooth, fun and professional! We have loved our long term stay here and are definitely coming back for cocktails and meals!!

Unfortunately booked 4 nights for myself and grandsons, Paid $600 something, BUT unfortunately had a family emergency and didn’t get any of the $600 back. So just be very careful when you book. All i got was my $100 Bond 🤦🏾‍♂️

Our staff interaction was limited to front of house manager and night grounds manager. They were both exceptionally helpful and friendly. The vibe at the park is great, almost like a Kibbutz. We found the caravan sites to be a good size with lots of mature trees for shade. The two pools were clean, as were the modern amenities.

Awesome customer service from Laura and Hannah at front reception. They went above and beyond for us end we couldn’t be more impressed with their professionalism and friendly nature. Great assets to the business.

Popped in out of the blue last night for a knock off beer. Ended up staying for a parmy and musical bingo! What a great night, will definately be back! And Fran, what a legend. You had me in fits of laughter more than once. Thankyou!!!!!
Nice
A beautiful place just limited seating around the pool, needs some sun loungers.
Beautiful park very clean lovely place to stay
So tropical,great pools, great tavern with $15 lunches. Bus stop outside.check-in easy

Average experience, like to think  great food but never turned up great atmosphere around pool they say but becauseof my hip replacementwouldn'tknow,rooms clean ,Bernadette and her husband  absolutely brilliant,  but asked for a late check out as my flight was delayed, for a 2 hr check out ,$50 , which was alright but they said no ,now they want more of a deposit out of my account on top of the $100 they have already taken, I am a sixty plus year old man, even if I out of nowhere decided to trash room ,I would probably put my shoulder out, so I am sorry to say i will never again  stay here ,sad but it is so sad 😞maybe to old to expect old fashioned service but pay you expect your dinner
Beautiful, clean resort. Friendly staff .

Myself and my wife were visiting family in Darwin. We were staying close by Free Spirit resort so decided to stop by for a couple of drinks. We were extremely impressed by the resort but even more so by the exceptional bar service. Jack the Irishman served us our drinks and made our experience even more enjoyable with his friendliness, witty charm and excellent recommendations. He recommended one of the wines for my wife which she loved. The happy hour deal is great too! We will definitely be visiting again if back in Darwin.

Thanks to the manager Laura, also Tegan for all your help, thanks to Brett, Burt, Ron and Andrew for keeping the park looking so nice, also thanks to Erica the cleaner. You all made our stay great for another year at Free spirit, keep up the good work.

Room was so small and crap paid alot of money for this and it wasn't even worth the money that we spent on it. The food wasn't the nicest I've had and the coffee was like having a cold Milo more foam then milk and I wouldn't go back.
Excellent facilities. Restaurant and bar by the swimming pool
A massive shout out to Georgia and her amazing customer service - absolute gem, pleasure to talk to and always ready to help with all our questions ! Thankyou Georgia - your one of a kind!

Georgia is the ultimate, blending unmatched friendliness, and helpfulness. She anticipates needs like a mind reader. Her warm demeanor and witty conversations make every interaction delightful. If there were Oscars for Bar attendance, Georgia would win them all. She’s the Swiss Army knife of attendants and deserves a cape and a statue in her honor. Stay amazing, Georgia!

A massive thanks to Jewel & the team at free spirit for hosting our wedding reception;
The food was absolutely incredible comments from all our guests about how good it was
The rooms were tidy, the wedding room was beautifully set up and exceeded all out expectations

JEWEL! Jewel is so helpful, so kind & always there through the whole planning process making this the easiest event I have ever planned!

5 stars and beyond for free spirit! 🙏🏼

We have stayed here for 9 months whilst we were doing some much needed repairs to our camper. Tegan and Laura have been a fabulous help to us in the office. Justin has been a fabulous help when it came to all the security problems in the park. Unfortunately like every where there are problems with locals staying in the park and fighting and or stealing. There were some time that we didn't feel safe as we had them break into our camper whilst we were sleeping. We were lucky enough to have stayed long enough to be offered a discounted weekly rate. The location was perfect for us as it is very central to everything you need in Darwin.

Oh wow the best park ever. Mick at the bar was so friendly and accommodating. Mick asked how long we were staying and made sure I had the beer I drank for the duration. Mick you are a legend along side with your work companion's. Come and stay . See Mick. You will not be disappointed .

We stayed at Darwin Free Spirit for a week while our family visited and we got some jobs done with the van and car. The reception staff were very friendly! Faye was exceptionally helpful and provided a lot of useful information about sites to see in Darwin!

Well just had barbecue pork and chicken wings.Ron the chef excelled himself
. First decent meal we have had in caravan parks. Don't lose him Darwin Freespirit he is why people come here for the meals.

Didn't stay in a room. However, have a powered site for several weeks.
Toilets and showers are clean, (however  some very unclean people use them and don't know how to use a toilet brush....) Park is clean and tidy.
Great staff. Great food in the resort, cold beer, plenty of sport on the bug screens, keno, pool, live music 5 days a week, happy hour at the bar.
Do yourself a favour and book your next holiday there.

Loved our stay here. Sunday was a roast dinner night and it was so very good!  The meat was sensational.
One of the best parks we’ve stayed in.
We had the Wake of my eldest brother who passed
Love this park.  The kiosk make the best coffee!  Thank you Jez!  And Fran makes you feel so welcome.  Thank you!!

State of Origin night.  Free chicken wings. Fantastic! However, a table of 2 gets 10 chicken wings. Our table of 12 people gets 10 chicken wings. Not even 1 each.  Thanks Jeremy. Only 10 per table. It does matter if there's 1 person or 20 on the table. No flexibility.

Highly recommend FreeSpirit. Our powered site was spacious, park is beautiful and facilities maintaned. The main pool/bar area was just like a resort, awesome for a dip and then nice to indulge at happy hour as well.
Well priced serviced cabins in good location with great pool bar

Just had a chilled out Sunday breaky at the bistro.  So lovely sitting beside the pool.  Great breakfast menu.  I will be back for the bacon and eggs with sourdough and the coffee.  Hubby will be back for the full breakfast! Thankyou to Georgia for an amazing salted caramel latte and a chai latte.  We will definitely be back!!!
Nice caravan park, clean facilities, nice pools and the staff were helpful.

What a fantastic park with an awesome bar and restaurant. Mick was the best barman around with happy friendly service and great local knowledge. Just having Mick there made us come back again and again. Well done guys.
Beside the highway without the highway noise. Less than 15 minutes to shops and Darwin city, airport, and all the attractions you want.

Just finished 2 stays at this resort, check in was such a breeze - Chantal was so lovely and welcoming - explained in detail where everything was around the park especially the dog area! Even helped me fill in my check in details whilst I kept my dog company.

Room was spacious and clean. A++++
Stayed here 10 years back. It has gone downhill since.  All the dogs in same section so they can bark at each other.  Staff did know what a drive thru was.

Very good place to relax, unwind and have a good time with your family. Very accessible place coz it's just along the highway yet you will feel you are on a vacation. Must visit specially this dry season!!!
We stayed here for 5 nights. The park was great but water running from our neighbours site left us in a mud pool the entire time.

We stayed in the more expensive section of the caravan parking for about 8 weeks. It was good value when they had the down season special of stay four pay three. The bathroom and laundry facilities we were closet to were great and fairly new. They were cleaned daily, although not always spotless.
While we were there everyone had major issues with groups of people staying at the park stealing items from under people’s awnings. A fridge full of alcohol got stolen amongst other things and one lady woke up to someone trying to steal her car. I didn’t see any security patrols, but the police came through a few times.
The location is right on the Stuart highway. There is a large shopping centre with lots of food options and a Woolworths, five minutes drive away. Bus stops right out the front. There is also a bike path that runs out the bath for riding or walking.
Service was always pretty friendly. We extended our stay a few times for convenience. On the last day I extended for another night and was told we would have to change sites because someone else was moving on to ours. No one ever did so we moved for nothing which was slightly annoying. They also must have messed it up in the system because I had six calls from reception over two days with different staff thinking we were checking out and then checking if we moved sites but never communicating it to the others.
The restaurant doesn’t have the best food, but the pool and park overall are pretty good, especially for families. And there are some cute resident possums!
The meeting room is very well appointed for small family celebrations 🍾 ❤️
I was only a visitor, very lax on drinking/swimming/glass next to and in the pool. No lifeguard and intoxicated parents isn't a good mix

Darwin FreeSpirit Resort may promise freedom, but it's not all smooth sailing. Brace yourself for a mixed bag.
With a sizable number of permanent residents, the transient vibe takes a hit. And if you're unlucky, you might catch a front-row seat to some late-night family feuds. To top it off, the amenities are showing their age and are about as cramped as rush hour traffic. But hey, if you're up for a challenge and can overlook these shortcomings, there's still some semblance of peace and nature to be found amidst the chaos.
Loved every second!

Great place, helpful staff. No complaints staff went above and beyond in many ways. Disability access room used. Micro wave could be knee high. Bump in door could be better. Pathways to restaurant would be great. However price was adjusted to fit, staff delivered food to participant in wheelchair. Cleaners were polite and appreciated a bit of a chat. Office staff were amazingly helpful. Great place. Oh and everything I see the pool I'd love to dive in it.

Paid quite a bit of money for the family villa - wanting a nicer stay. The room was in a terrible condition, however. It was evident the air conditioners had not been cleaned in a long time; mould was visible & the villa had an ant problem.
All appliances very old and used.
We made the most of it and it was comfortable enough... but I certainly felt a bit ripped off for the price. I'd have been better off just getting a cabin.

I have super high praise for the pool area and performers. I very much enjoyed sitting by the pool, listening to the singers - they were great! The staff were polite too.

The only reason I probably wouldn't stay again is due to the room. But otherwise, a wonderful place.

Nice clean facilities.  Internal roading needs some TLC.  Some good deals to be had at the bistro but drinks in deals limited to house wine, beer on tap (as long as you don't want the tap ginger beer), and soft drinks.

All up a nice spot to spend a few nights.

Wonderful location. Very friendly staff.
Will definitely return.
Kind and friendly service and great food and great place
Upgrade looks good around the bar welcoming atmosphere for any occasion
Great relaxing place to have fun eat and enjoy clean comfortable rooms 👌
If I could rate this place higher i would. It is incredible and the staff only make it 100 times better again

Great Family friendly place to bring your caravan. Got good laundry facilities, toilets and showers extremely clean. However you need to lock bikes etc up as people can either jump fence or walk through boom gate.  There is security patrolling the entire park.
Main pool area has bistro and bar. Meals very nice and bar, goes without saying. Have nightly specials also like roast night, steak night etc
Well worth the stay

My favourite hotel / resort / caravan park in Darwin. Had my 30th birthday party there many years ago.  Easter long weekend is fabulous for the child's & families. With events every day for the kids & Sunday Easter hun. Reminds me of the family trips we had as kids.
The place has 3 pools spread out over the park, bar & live music Friday & Sunday nights. Pokies Gaming room.  Although the bar closes quite early most nights. Food is great & best thing is it's dog friendly!
Nice spot, 2 pools, bar and restaurant, a big thumbs up from me.

Didn't really use much but the rooms. Was comfortable and clean. Was enough for the 2 x nights we stayed.
Pool was great the kids loved it.
Loved our stay here. 3 pools, a great bar, gaming room, keno, TVs, great food, entertainment and fantastic service. Special shout out to Julia in the bar! Thanks Julia!
Has everything you need, multiple pools great bar and bistro plenty of space and is a good location to be at for day trips 😀

The event room is quite nice, the lighting is nice and intimate but considered quite dark at night (not other choice of light to make the room bright). The aircon works well, but the path going to the room is definitely not wheelchair friendly. The catering food quality is quite good, won't order the sliders and pizza again as they were very dry but the antipasto, wings and others are good.
Parking is not difficult, plenty of staff helping around.
Good Service, price of food is good. Gaming area.

Beautiful room, very comfortable and amazing facilities..
Miscommunication between bar staff and kitchen.
Only place to sit for the meal was beside the pool. It was a very hot day, we asked to sit in the restaurant because it wasn't officially open for meals.
No room service offered.
Be careful of 🐊
Saviours
Wonderful caravan park. Neat and tidy. It was lovely to see green grass.
Great park for families. Plenty of amenity blocks, very clean, 3 pools, bar and restaurant. Good sized sites.

First impressions,  I was greeted by overflowing rubbish bins.

I totally understand accidents happen ie. Burst water mains. Water was turned off to the park whilst guest and myself were showering. No notice was given no updates as to when the water was to be turned back on. I was stuck in the shower. I enquired about getting a bucket of water to rinse off. No bucket of water was supplied.

This was a terrible experience and I hope it was a one off but my family and I will not be revisiting this caravan park.

Thank you, it wasn't much of an email.

We had the absolute pleasure of having our Wedding at the wonderful resort.
Want to thank all the amazing staff for everything they did for us over a full on week.
We were looked after so well, aswell as our guests!
Personal shoutout to the amazing and beautiful Jewel!! She took over our wedding planning at quite a late stage, and she made our day absolutely perfect.
Thank you DFSR staff. We couldnt have asked for a better stay and event

FreeSpirt was the best! Lots of people to make friends, petrol station next to the resort, stray cats living there (Friendly, except big ginger cat) and three pools.
Great!!!!

What a great place to stay! I was impressed by the rooms - the bed was comfy! I spent an enjoyable time in the bar, where I had the NT Barra, must try! Also see Chris at the bar for a fantastic whisky - if you dare!

Thanks for the enjoyable stay!

Darwin Free Spirit Resort is a family friendly and fun place to stay when visiting the Darwin area.
This weekend there was live music on both Friday and Saturday evenings. The bar and bistro serve great food and the wonderful atmosphere is testimony to Chris and his hard working but friendly team.
They make a mean cocktail too.

Called to make a booking for a camp-site. Told them I had four dogs with Mr multiple times. They said no worries. Upon arrival after driving almost 7 hours they said its not allowed. Cancelled my booking. Only two reasons I believe they did this. Either they saw my colour and cancelled or someone overbooked the camping grounds. Overall , disgusting behavior. Lucky we call another park( Hidden Valley Caravan park) they accepted us for the time we were in Darwin..Just bad and disgusting service. Not to mention I had even pre paid my site..Geez..Avoid this place as they are very unreliable. That ain't the territory way..🤮🤮🤮🤮
Litchfield site for 8 days, enjoyed our stay. Meals lovely. Clean amenities near our site. Found an item that a lady had lost in the premium area laundry. Contact reception as I left it with them.

For a caravan it's ok if you have some shade, albeit their are higher tariff for shady spots. Has extra pools if you want to cool off which you will need from mid August when the park starts to get pretty hot.
Lovely shady site, reception very helpful,  extra pools away from the crowd, tavern has great food, bus stop outside

Decent location to the airport and city centre but out the way enough for a quiet night. Great for kids with the pools, jumping pillow and outdoor areas. Decent facilities for longer stays. Recommended
Great deals and great to have birthday parties for the family.

I'm in  Cabin here at the resort.
It's often a bit arduous getting info from a front desk at other places.

Julie and Abby welcomed me yesterday and cheerfully gave me some top tips of things to do and see around Darwin while I'm here.

Julie and Abby were courteous, professional and really knew their stuff.

Thanks for the laughs and info.

Cheers.

Very good camping! Service very great, all the facilities you need for camping and always very clean. 3 very nice swimming pools. Toilet, shower and kitchen close to your campsite. Great bar and restaurant! We recommended! 👍👍👍
Very friendly staff
Ablutions old but clean

We have been here a few times and while the cabins, facilities, pool and bar are wonderful, the food is a MASSIVE let down. Everything is basically fried, nothing we ate tasted fresh. I thought, you can't go wrong with a pizza, but I got it wrong- it was awful, tasteless and cold.
Id suggezt to stick to a smaller menu, so you can by fresh, turn the food over at a higher rate and bring out specials to mix it up. I have never not wanted to eat. In fact, so bad that I had to throw up after a meal.
Sorry, sounds awful, as everything else was great at this place, but guess I can't stomach oily, fatty non fresh food.
Great atmosphere, great bar and great sweet potato fries!
We stayed on a powered site and really enjoyed all the park had to offer. Mention for Julie at reception who looked after us on the initial book in and times after that answering all our questions
Dom Georgie and Sally are awesome! looked after us all night in the bar. Great place.
Best place to stay in darwin! the Bar Staff are Fantastic Tara Jake & Marco are the best Bar Staff in Darwin always a vibe!

Was going to stay for a week, but rates at a premium $. Had a terrible site with 4 vans squashed in around us. Packed in like sardines with no privacy. Lots of permanent vans around us, but not everyone has the same idea of tidynes.
Only stayed for 1nt.
The amenities have 10 basins, very difficult to find a tap that works, maintenance has an issue.
Will never go back there 😒
Amazing customer service.  Staff member Jewel was so friendly and happy to assist with all my inquiries.

This caravan park is nice enough.  Good sized sites, nice staff, good pools and bistro area and decent amenities. There is a shopping centre close by. Also there's a bike path that goes along the back. And you can catch a bus to the CBD or Casuarina from right out the front. Be aware though that it's under a flight path. Also for the entirety of our stay (3 weeks) it was a challenge to be able to use a washing machine, as most of them weren't working. And finally, the amenities were cleaned every day (good) but the time of cleaning was 8am/9am...right when people are wanting to use the bathroom! So annoying and frustrating. Every single day!

Definitely not worth $89 per night, it's a nice caravan park but the price is steep. We've stayed at caravan parks that are half the price which are better in more ways than one. The  facilities are ok but make sure you go early because they clean them at 8am onwards. Over half the washing machines are out of order and from the reviews it's been like that for a while. Road noise at night. planes during the day, gardeners making noise and dust during the day blowing the paths so you need to cover your washing that is drying otherwise you'll have to wait for a free washing machine again which can take a while or put on a load at midnight. Food from the bistro is good as long as it's still hot when you get it, one out of three meals where hot. Location is good but I won't be staying there again unfortunately.

We have been here for in a van for 2 weeks and think it's a great place. Tiolets are clean and well looked after. Grassy sites with slabs. Big trees for shade. Note that not all sites are shaded. We have a large site with good space around us. Position is good, 5min to shopping, The bar area is good beside the main pool with happy hr and meals. Music most evenings. A second small pool at the back of the property is used by adults. There is a bike path behind the property thats goes into the city or down to Coolalinga...past the major shopping centre. Definitely be returning.
Spacious shady RV sites. Clean and modern amenities.

Great caravan park with nice amenities.
The bar also has good food and drinks which is a plus.

We stayed in a garden cabin in this very large and nice park. We liked the cabins high ceilings, ceiling fans, air conditioning, carport, good shower. Roomy for the two of us.  There was a piece of flooring ripped off in the main area that probably could have had a piece of furniture put over it to hide it.
The resort has 3 pools,  restaurant and bar  with family friendly atmosphere. A good spot for a meal and drink after a day of exploring.
excellent facilities and layout

The dearest caravan park in Darwin. I have stayed in two other parks in Darwin nearly half the price. Very small sights jammed in so tight you can hear the neighbours sneezing ha. The section we are in there are two toilets and two showers for a hundred plus people otherwise you walk half way through the park to use the main block. Very noisy on the highway traffic all night and under the flight path for the airport lucky it’s not the busiest airport but they do have one flight at 2am   For $90 a night not worth it.
A great van park clean amenities great pools and close to the city all you could ask for in a city van park
Can't fault it at all

First time I've ever been here! Was absolutely awsum. It was the school holidays when I was there a few weeks ago so it was quite busy. Spent the arvo there with my God Daughter, one of her friends & my besties husband. Had a few beers to unwind, it was just really chilled. There's heaps of shaded areas, which is a must. You can order meals there if ya get hungry. The staff were also really good.
Julie and Jo in the office, best help and both very helpful and friendly. Both great at there job
We were unpowered  , nice and quiet  , great showers and toilets ,they look new , instant  hot water , best showers we've had in 6 weeks on the road , nice place to stay and refresh
Loud party noise in the next cabin way past midnight and no-one stopping it, no sleep, very angry.
Great park . Everything was great
Meet people to eat who where staying there

We are locals and have stayed here multiple times over the years for events and provide functions. The facilities in the park are great for families. Everytime we had a function we book a room as it’s so convenient for the kids and us. Be check in during the day and used the park than had the rooms to get ready for the function. Highly recommended freespirit for functions. We have even come here for the day and had lunch to use the pool. Such a great spot to spend a few hours or the day by the pool with the family.

Nice facilities including 2 swimming pools and a jumping pillow for kids. There is a Bar and Bistro next to the main swimming pool. Could be improved by adding cement footpath throughout the place, as you have to walk through a lot of dirt as you make your way around the park. Also they should have some CC Cameras installed to deter the locals from trying to break into your car and cabin.

Studio room was in very good condition and very clean - fit for purpose.

Minor issues:
> noisy neighbour in Studio room immediately behind, as they fell asleep to their (very loud) TV
> Studio rooms are close to the front gate, so hear cars passing through early in the morning
Great caravan park, facilities lovely and new. Nice pool and bar. Staff lovely.
Have our own motohome.

Very expensive $89 per night for small powered site. Very crammed in with no privacy. Facilities are very substandard. Only 1 out of 3 washing machines worked. I expected a lot more for the price we paid.
Great entertainment
Big caravan park. Great amenities, close to the centre of Darwin
